evals.prompt: I need cert bundle for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the bundle-checker skill for this bundle checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects bundle-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_bundle.
Keeps the response focused on checking certificate bundle completeness and diagnosing missing intermediate certificates via AIA (Authority Information Access).

evals.prompt: Why is example.com still missing an intermediate certificate in the bundle? Check the served chain and AIA fallback.
evals.expected_output: Use the bundle-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects bundle-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
